task_objective: Update the README documentation for the game_install_finder tool.
design_decisions: Documented the existing module invocation because pyproject.toml does not define a console script entry point.
Described local-only Steam discovery and JSON output fields based on the existing CLI implementation.
Added a README regression test covering installation, usage examples, CLI options, JSON output, and dependency requirements.
results: Red protocol test failed against the scaffold README.
Updated README with tool description, installation, usage examples, CLI options, JSON output examples, dependency requirements, development commands, and license information.
After the README update, ./run.sh uv run ruff check . --fix passed.
After the README update, ./run.sh uv run ruff format . passed.
After the README update, ./run.sh uv run ty check src/ passed.
After the README update, ./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 9 tests.
